title: Hunt is Now Open
description: A cinematic vertical slideshow announcing the opening of Hunt, the pre-launch Intelligence Fragment expedition across the Vorinthex Galaxy.
style: Premium Vorinthex AI: obsidian black, polished chrome, dark glass, subtle volumetric lighting, cinematic sci-fi realism, premium enterprise aesthetic, minimalist composition, mobile-first 9:16, consistent visual language across every slide, generous negative space for overlay text, never render text inside images, no logos, no UI, no watermarks.

slides.title: Hunt is now open.
slides.visual: A mysterious Intelligence Fragment floating above an obsidian landscape. Premium chrome edges, subtle internal glow, cinematic fog and dramatic lighting. The beginning of the Hunt.

slides.title: Explore the Vorinthex Galaxy.
slides.visual: A lone Explorer overlooking vast futuristic worlds connected across the Vorinthex Galaxy. Hidden Intelligence Fragments glow in the distance, inviting exploration.

slides.title: Collect Intelligence Fragments.
slides.visual: A premium collection of Intelligence Fragments ranging from common to legendary. Every fragment has a unique crystalline geometry, subtle energy core and luxurious chrome detailing floating in deep space.

slides.title: Climb the global leaderboard.
slides.visual: A premium holographic leaderboard rising from polished dark glass. Anonymous Explorers climb the rankings while collected Intelligence Fragments orbit around the highest-ranked players.

slides.title: Earn exclusive launch rewards.
slides.visual: Exclusive Founder rewards displayed on premium obsidian pedestals. Rare collectibles, early access, exclusive badges and mystery rewards are hinted at without revealing everything.

slides.title: The expedition has begun.
slides.visual: A breathtaking cinematic view across the Vorinthex Galaxy. Countless planets, stars and distant Intelligence Fragments await discovery, creating a powerful feeling that the journey has only just begun.
